title: Grafana Provisioned Dashboard and Data Source Config Drift
app: GitOps exporter comparing disk YAML to API `/api/dashboards/uid` hash
spl:
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" component=provisioning
| search "provisioned dashboard" OR "provisioned datasource" OR "provisioning"
| search failed OR error OR "cannot delete" OR mismatch OR "already exists" OR "invalid"
| stats count, values(path) as paths, values(name) as objects, latest(_raw) as sample by provisioner, host
| where count >= 1
| sort -count
description: As-code provisioning should be the source of truth; manual UI edits to provisioned objects create drift that the next sync overwrites unexpectedly. Combining provisioning logs with datasource content hashes exposes shadow changes.
value: Prevents surprise dashboard loss during deploys and keeps staging/prod aligned.
implementation: Prefer emitting `json_sha256` from CI for expected state and join in Splunk. Simplify the `append` subsearch if only logs are available: alert on provisioning error lines alone.
visualization: Diff table, timeline of provisioning errors, single-value (drift count).
grandmaExplanation: We see which views and stored searches people actually use so we can drop clutter and keep the right work maintained.
knownFalsePositives: Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.
